title: ballota somala
intro: Ballota somala, also known as Sumatran pennyroyal, is a plant species in the mint family that is native to the Indonesian island of Sumatra. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat digestive issues, such as nausea and flatulence. The health benefits of Ballota somala include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and improve overall well-being. The herbal preparations of Ballota somala typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
